creator: ralf.folkerts@gmx.de
text:
Hi,

unfortunately I did not manage to get the Info re. the BIOS-Bug that was 
mentioned in the amd64-Mailing-List-Post by Jung-uk Kim :-(

So, would it be possible to "generally" limit the DMA-Size in the 
ATA-Driver for the SB600?

After running a few Tests I reverted back to the hw.physmem as I'm 
afraid of having to re-apply the Mod. to the DMA code each time rebuild 
the Kernel ;-)

Cheers,
_ralf_
